Running: apply controls against observations...
Done:    apply controls against observations (2 files, 57ms)
Hint:
  stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-s3-golden-path/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-s3-golden-path/observations

Next steps:
  1. Identify the root cause: `stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-s3-golden-path/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-s3-golden-path/observations`
  2. View a summary: `stave apply --format text`
  3. Export findings for S3: `stave apply --format json > findings.json`
